compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect eval scaffold generator and TODO guard
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md and CLAUDE.md to document the generator, TODO guard, and generateŌåÆfill-inŌåÆcommit workflow.

**Why**: Future agents and developers need accurate awareness of the generator and guard to author evals without reading source code.

**Scope**:
- IN: SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md updates (generator usage, TODO convention, guard behavior, worked example), CLAUDE.md updates (architecture section, quick reference)
- OUT: New documentation files

Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, SKILL-EVALS-GUIDE.md enables a skill author to (a) run generate-skill-eval.sh and produce a valid scaffold, (b) replace all TODOs with llm-rubric assertions following the documented convention, and (c) understand why the commit guard blocks a TODO-marked eval ŌĆö all without reading source code. Verified by: guide contains a complete worked example showing the generateŌåÆfill-inŌåÆcommit cycle.
